name: Consumer can book a service
description: When a user navigates to the service catalog, they can select a service, choose a date and address, and proceed to checkout.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the service catalog page
If a LocalTunnel reminder page is shown, click the 'Click to Continue' button to bypass it.
Wait for the service catalog to load and click on the 'Book Now' or 'View Details' button for the first available service.
On the service details page, fill out the scheduling form by selecting a date, time, area, street, and house number.
Submit the scheduling form by clicking the 'Proceed to Checkout' or 'Book Now' button.
Verify that the user is navigated to the secure checkout page and an order summary is visible.
